refine IsOpenMap.locallyCompactSpace (Quotient.mk (MulAction.orbitRel Γ (Eucl n))) (fun u hu ↦ ?_)
  rw [isOpen_quotient_iff]
  change IsOpen (⋃ γ : Γ, (γ • ·) '' u)
  exact isOpen_iUnion fun γ ↦ γ.1.toHomeomorph.isOpenMap u hu

let π := Quotient.mk (MulAction.orbitRel (↥↑Γ) (Eucl n))
  have hπ : IsOpenMap π := fun u hu ↦ by
    rw [isOpen_quotient_iff]
    change IsOpen (π ⁻¹' (π '' u))
    have : π ⁻¹' (π '' u) = ⋃ (g : ↥↑Γ), (g : (Eucl n) ≃ₗ[ℝ] (Eucl n)) '' u := by
      ext x; simp only [Set.mem_preimage, Set.mem_image, Set.mem_iUnion,
        MulAction.orbitRel_apply, MulAction.mem_orbit_iff]
      exact ⟨fun ⟨y, hy, g, hg⟩ ↦ ⟨g⁻¹, y, hy, by simp [hg]⟩,
             fun ⟨g, y, hy, hg⟩ ↦ ⟨y, hy, g⁻¹, by simp [hg]⟩⟩
    rw [this]
    exact isOpen_iUnion fun g ↦ (g : (Eucl n) ≃ₗ[ℝ] (Eucl n)).toHomeomorph.isOpenMap u hu
  constructor
  intro y s hs
  obtain ⟨x, rfl⟩ := Quotient.exists_rep y
  rcases local_compact_nhds (continuous_quotient_mk.continuousAt hs) with ⟨k, hk, hks, hk'⟩
  exact ⟨π '' k, hπ.image_mem_nhds hk, hk'.image continuous_quotient_mk,
    Set.image_subset_iff.mpr hks⟩

let _ : TopologicalSpace (Eucl n) := DTop
  have : DTopCompatible (Eucl n) := inferInstance
  have : LocallyCompactSpace (Eucl n) := dTop_eq (Eucl n) ▸ inferInstance
  refine IsOpenMap.locallyCompactSpace ?_ (fun x ↦ Quotient.exists_rep x)
  intro u hu
  rw [isOpen_coinduced]
  have eq : (Quotient.mk _ ⁻¹' (Quotient.mk _ '' u)) = ⋃ (g : Γ), (g • ·) '' u := by
    ext x; simp only [Set.mem_preimage, Set.mem_image, Set.mem_iUnion]
    exact ⟨fun ⟨y, hy, hxy⟩ ↦ let ⟨g, hg⟩ := Quotient.exact hxy; ⟨g, y, hy, hg⟩,
           fun ⟨g, y, hy, hg⟩ ↦ ⟨y, hy, Quotient.sound ⟨g, hg⟩⟩⟩
  rw [eq, isOpen_iUnion_iff]
  intro g
  rw [dTop_eq (Eucl n)] at hu ⊢
  exact (g.1.toContinuousLinearEquiv.toHomeomorph).isOpenMap u hu

let π : Eucl n → MulAction.orbitRel.Quotient Γ (Eucl n) := Quotient.mk _
  have hπ : IsOpenMap π := fun u hu ↦ by
    rw [isOpen_coinduced]
    convert isOpen_iUnion fun g : Γ ↦ (g.1.toHomeomorph).isOpenMap u hu using 1
    ext x; simp [Quotient.eq, MulAction.orbitRel_apply]
    constructor
    · rintro ⟨y, hy, g, rfl⟩; exact ⟨g⁻¹, y, hy, by simp⟩
    · rintro ⟨g, y, hy, rfl⟩; exact ⟨y, hy, g⁻¹, by simp⟩
  constructor
  intro y U hy
  obtain ⟨x, rfl⟩ := Quotient.exists_rep y
  obtain ⟨K, hK, hKc, hKsub⟩ := local_compact_nhds (hπ.continuous.continuousAt hy)
  exact ⟨π '' K, hπ.image_mem_nhds hK, hKc.image hπ.continuous, Set.image_subset_iff.mpr hKsub⟩

      · rintro ⟨g, y, hy, rfl⟩; exact ⟨y, hy, g⁻¹, by simp⟩
    rw [this]
    exact isOpen_iUnion fun g ↦ (g : (Eucl n) ≃ₗ[ℝ] (Eucl n)).isOpenMap u hu
  constructor
  intro y s hs
  rcases Quotient.mk_surjective y with ⟨x, rfl⟩
  rcases local_compact_nhds (continuous_quotient_mk.continuousAt hs) with ⟨k, hk_nhds, hk_sub, hk_cpt⟩
  exact ⟨π '' k, π_open.image_mem_nhds hk_nhds, Set.image_subset_iff.mpr hk_sub, hk_cpt.image continuous_quotient_mk⟩

have : Finite Γ := Γ.2
  let π : Eucl n → MulAction.orbitRel.Quotient Γ (Eucl n) := Quotient.mk _
  have h : IsOpenMap π := fun u hu ↦ by
    rw [isOpen_quotient_iff]
    convert isOpen_iUnion (fun (g : Γ) ↦ (g : _ ≃ₗ[ℝ] _).toHomeomorph.isOpenMap u hu) using 1
    ext x
    simp only [Set.mem_preimage, Set.mem_image, Set.mem_iUnion]
    constructor
    · rintro ⟨y, hy, hxy⟩
      obtain ⟨g, hg⟩ := Quotient.exact hxy
      exact ⟨g⁻¹, y, hy, by simp [hg]⟩
    · rintro ⟨g, y, hy, rfl⟩
      exact ⟨y, hy, Quotient.sound ⟨g⁻¹, by simp⟩⟩
  exact h.locallyCompactSpace
